w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: Build a single-file HTML marketing website for
for independent fitness, yoga, and wellness coaches in India.
- Primary accent: #F20000 (red — used sparingly, max 2-3 elements per section)
- Barlow Condensed: display/headlines only. Max weight 500. Always uppercase.
- Urbanist: all body copy, labels, buttons, nav, forms, UI text.
- Instrument Serif: italic quotes and mission statements only.
- overflow-x: hidden on html and body
- Fixed nav: 64px height, becomes opaque + backdrop-blur after 60px scroll
- Single-page. All sections in one HTML file. Anchor scroll navigation.
- Links: Features, How It Works, Pricing,
- CTA button: "Get Started" — red background, Urbanist 700
- Hamburger on mobile → full-screen overlay menu with Barlow 500 links
- Eyebrow: red line + "Built for Indian Coaches — Runs on WhatsApp" (Urbanist 500 uppercase)
- H1 title (Barlow Condensed 500, clamp 52px–96px, uppercase, line-height 1.05):
onboarding, weekly check-ins, and renewal reminders — natively on
WhatsApp. 30 minutes to set up. Runs automatically after that."
- Two CTAs: "Start Free Trial" (red solid button) + "See How It Works" (ghost border button)
- Stats row (3 items, Barlow Condensed 500 for numbers, Urbanist 400 for labels):
- Background: subtle red grid (#F20000, 4% opacity, 60px grid, radial mask)
- Tab switcher pill above the phone: "Client View" (WhatsApp green when active)
- Phone frame: #1A1A1A, border-radius 38px, 290px wide, shadow with red tint
- Phone screen has two views that crossfade (opacity +
- Bot message (purple bubble, red left border): check-in questions from Coach Priya
- Client reply (green sent bubble): energy 8/10, 4 sessions, 5km run
- Bot AI reply (purple bubble): congratulations, coach will review Wednesday
- Client reply: "Thank you! This system is so convenient
Header: "FITOSYS" in Barlow 500, subtitle "Coach Priya · Week 12", green live dot
a) 3-stat row: "28 Active Clients" (green), "73% Check-in Rate" (amber),
b) Bar chart — 7 days (M T W T F S S), bars animate from height 0 on entry.
: green (strong), amber (moderate), red (low). Height varies per day.
d) Priority client list — 3 clients with avatars + status badges:
- Two floating stat cards (absolute positioned, #141414, border #222, border-radius 12px):
Card 1 (top right): "Weekly Response Rate / 73% / 22 of 30 clients checked in" + red bar
Card 2 (bottom left): "Renewal Alert / 3 clients / expiring in 7 days / Reminders sent
AUTO-CYCLE: Phone auto-switches between WhatsApp and Dashboard every 5000ms.
Stops on user tab click. Never restarts after user interaction.
CSS-only infinite marquee. Background #111111, border top/bottom.
Content: severity scores and pain points from Indian coach research.
Red dots as separators. animation: 30s linear infinite
Two columns. Left: section label + large Barlow title + 3 pain cards.
"YOUR COACHING / IS EXCELLENT. / YOUR SYSTEM / IS BROKEN."
(Line 3 "EXCELLENT." in red, line 4 "YOUR SYSTEM" as ghost outline)
3 pain cards (stacked, #111111 background, 3px left border red on hover):
- "01 — REVENUE LEAKAGE / Renewals Slipping Through Gaps /
Programs expire unnoticed. No system. No reminders."
- "02 — ENGAGEMENT BLIND SPOT / No Early Warning for Disengagement /
Without check-ins, coaches only know clients struggle when they drop out."
+ red cost badge "10–20% annual churn from retention blindness"
- "03 — ADMIN BURNOUT / 2–4 Hours Per Week on Non-Coaching Work /
WhatsApp follow-ups. Payment chasing. Manual onboarding."
+ red cost badge "8–12 hours/week average admin overhead"
- Large serif italic quote mark in red (opacity 0.3)
- Instrument Serif italic quote from Coach Priya about Sunday exhaustion
- Attribution with red subtext "2.5 hours recovered per week after
- Dark block with the core promise: "manage 40 clients with effort of 15"
6 feature cards in 3-column grid (2-column on tablet, 1-column on mobile):
Urbanist 600 title, Urbanist 400 body, category tag.
04 — AI Monday Summary / AI Powered tag (red)
05 — GST Invoice Generation / Compliance Built-in tag (red)
Card hover: top border becomes red, ghost number tints red, 3D tilt effect
4 steps in a horizontal grid. Red connecting arrows between steps
Step 1: Sign Up & Create Profile (5 min)
Step 2: Create Your First Program (8 min)
Step 3: Share Your Onboarding Link (15 min to first client)
Each step: ghost number (Barlow 500, 68px, red 8% opacity), red circle badge
with step number (Urbanist 700), Urbanist 600 title, Urbanist 400 body,
red time indicator with clock icon.
Two columns. Left: content. Right: phone
Title: "YOUR CLIENTS / NEVER / NEED AN / APP."
: shows a renewal conversation thread in WhatsApp format.
parallax scrolls on scrub via GSAP.
Two columns. Left: 3 AI feature cards. Right: AI Summary
- Header: "Monday AI Summary — Week 12" + "Gemini Powered" red badge
- Priority insight box (red tint): flags Anjali, Vikram, Meera as at-risk
- Win box (green tint): highlights Rahul 5km, Deepa 5 sessions
Risk / Rahul Strong / Deepa Champion / Vikram Watch
header. 4 pricing cards in a grid.
1,499/month — up to 25 clients — FEATURED (red top border, pulse glow animation)
Price numbers: Barlow 500, 50px. Plan names: Barlow 500 uppercase, 12px, red.
Featured card has "Most Popular" badge (red pill, top right).
Non-featured cards lift -6px on hover via GSAP.
Featured card has continuous box-shadow pulse animation.
Cards: large quote mark (Barlow 500, red tint), Instrument Serif italic quote,
ROI block (Barlow 500 number + Urbanist body), author with
- Priya Sharma — 2.5hrs saved weekly — fitness coach Mumbai 28 clients
1.8L annual renewal recovered — yoga instructor Delhi 22 clients
- Ananya Krishnan — 94% check-in response rate — nutrition coach Bangalore 35 clients
exists because India's best coaches shouldn't be drowning in
WhatsApp messages. The system should run. You should coach."
- 3 brand pillars: India-First Always / Systems Over Features / Coach Revenue is Sacred
- Large ghost text "FIT / OSYS" in Barlow 500, outline only, very low opacity
Red section with subtle white grid overlay.
Body: "14-day free trial. No credit card. Setup in 30 minutes." (Urbanist 400)
CTA: "Start Free Trial →" — white button, red text, inverts on hover.
Two columns. Left: channels. Right: demo request form.
Fields: First Name + Last Name (row), WhatsApp Number, Coaching Type (select),
Submit: "Book Your Demo →" — red full-width button.
All inputs: Urbanist 400, 15px, dark background, red border on focus.
Brand: "FITO" + red "SYS" + tagline + "A product by Alchemetryx"
Columns: Product / Company / Support with relevant links.
### Hero entrance sequence (fires on page load, no scroll trigger):
opacity 0→1, duration 1.1s, stagger 0.12s, ease power4.out, delay 0.2s
4. CTA buttons: y:30→0, opacity 0→1, duration 0.9s, delay 1.05s
5. Stats row: y:30→0, opacity 0→1, duration 0.9s, delay 1.2s
7. Float card 1 (top right): x:50→0, opacity 0→1, duration 1s, delay 1.1s
9. Float cards loop float: gsap.to, y -10px, duration 3s, repeat -1, yoyo,
### Hero stat counter animation (fires 1300ms after load):
Animate hero stat numbers from 0 to final value using
on each tick. Append the suffix (hrs, K+, min) from a span.
Apply to each of these selectors individually with
Animate value from 0 to number. Detect decimal from original text.
Elements show at final state immediately if reduced motion is preferred.
// re-trigger bar fill animations: set animation none, force reflow, restore
## CSS TRANSITIONS FOR PHONE VIEW SWITCH
- Single HTML file. All CSS inline in <style>. No external stylesheets.
- No third-party scripts (no analytics, no pixels, no chat widgets).
- overflow-x: hidden on html and body.
- Scrollbar: 3px wide, red thumb (#F20000), black track.
- All form inputs: no outline on focus — use border-
- All buttons and links: no text-decoration.
- Touch targets: min 44x44px for all interactive elements.
- Samsung Internet compatible (avoid CSS features not supported in Samsung
weekly check-ins, and renewal reminders for independent coaches in India —
<meta name="keywords" content="coaching software India, WhatsApp automation
coaches, fitness coach CRM, yoga coach software India, wellness coach platform">
Output: one complete, self-contained HTML file. No placeholder comments
like "add content here". All sections fully built with real
